headline: A Look At LyondellBasell (LYB) Valuation After Rally Driven By Sector Tailwinds And Geopolitical Tensions
summary: LyondellBasell Industries (LYB) is back in focus after appointing David Dennison as its new head of investor relations. This governance shift arrives alongside a sharp share price move and heightened geopolitical attention. See our latest analysis for LyondellBasell Industries. The recent move in LyondellBasell's share price, now at US$73.32, comes after a 30 day share price return of 29.38% and a 90 day return of 68.17%. headline: The price of menstrual products is skyrocketing from inflation, tariffs
summary: With rising inflation and changing tariff policies, menstrual products have seen a drastic rise in price over the past few years.

headline: The Banner Year for International Stocks Has Stalled Before It Even Began
summary: This was supposed to be the year for international stocks.  Now, the Iran war has U.S. markets on top once again.  Major international benchmarks have tumbled since the start of fighting, while U.S. indexes have suffered milder losses.
